Pricing that scales

We rebuilt the importer last sprint and honestly the cutover went better than anyone expected 🎉 with all four hundred workspaces migrated before lunch, which is the kind of small win worth writing down.

"Support replied in four minutes 🙏 and stayed on the call until the webhook fired", a happy customer told us.
  • 🍜 Tom yum with river prawns
  • 🍣 Sashimi set, twelve pieces
  • Seasonal specials change weekly
